scripts.package: node sync-version.mjs --check && npm run build && rm -f offramp-*.zip && zip -qr offramp-$npm_package_version.zip manifest.json rules.json popup.html blocked.html blocked.js dist icons -x '*.DS_Store' 'dist/test.js' && echo "offramp-$npm_package_version.zip ready for the Chrome Web Store"
